properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key for JWT token generation and validation

properties.name: app.jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT access token expiration time in milliseconds (default: 18000000 = 5 hours)

properties.name: app.jwt.refresh-expiration
properties.description: JWT refresh token expiration time in milliseconds (default: 604800000 = 7 days)
